name: freshdesk
description: Manage support tickets and contacts in Freshdesk

envVars.name: FRESHDESK_API_KEY
envVars.description: Freshdesk API key (used as the HTTP Basic username), from Profile Settings → View API Key

envVars.name: FRESHDESK_API_PASSWORD
envVars.description: HTTP Basic password for Freshdesk — leave as the default 'X'; Freshdesk authenticates with the API key as username and a dummy password

tools.name: List Tickets
tools.description: List support tickets in the Freshdesk account

domain.description: Your Freshdesk subdomain — the part before .freshdesk.com in your helpdesk URL

filter.description: Predefined filter: new_and_my_open, watching, spam, or deleted

updated_since.description: Only return tickets updated since this ISO 8601 timestamp

order_by.description: Sort field: created_at, due_by, updated_at, or status

historicalSummary.omitted: ticket descriptions, conversations, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Ticket
tools.description: Get details of a Freshdesk ticket

domain.description: Your Freshdesk subdomain — the part before .freshdesk.com

include.description: Extra data to embed: conversations, requester, company, or stats

tools.name: Create Ticket
tools.description: Create a new support ticket in Freshdesk

domain.description: Your Freshdesk subdomain — the part before .freshdesk.com

tags.description: Tags to apply to the ticket

tools.name: Update Ticket
tools.description: Update fields on an existing Freshdesk ticket

domain.description: Your Freshdesk subdomain — the part before .freshdesk.com

tools.name: List Contacts
tools.description: List contacts in the Freshdesk account

domain.description: Your Freshdesk subdomain — the part before .freshdesk.com

prompts.title: Open tickets
prompts.prompt: List my open Freshdesk tickets with their priorities and due dates.

prompts.title: Create a ticket
prompts.prompt: Create a new Freshdesk ticket with a subject, description, and requester email.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Freshdesk API Setup

steps.title: Create a Freshdesk account
steps.description: Sign up at https://www.freshdesk.com/ — the free plan or a trial works for testing. Note your subdomain (yourcompany in yourcompany.freshdesk.com).

steps.title: Find your API key
steps.description: In Freshdesk, click your profile picture → Profile Settings, then reveal 'Your API Key' on the right side.

steps.title: Set environment variables
steps.description: Add FRESHDESK_API_KEY to your .env. Leave FRESHDESK_API_PASSWORD unset (it defaults to 'X') — Freshdesk uses HTTP Basic auth with the API key as the username and a dummy password.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Tickets tool with your subdomain as the domain parameter.

notes: Freshdesk does not use OAuth for its REST API; HTTP Basic with the personal API key is the official method
The API key inherits the permissions of the agent it belongs to
All endpoints are per-account: https://<domain>.freshdesk.com/api/v2, HTTPS only
